nasb.text: And He was saying to her, “Let the children be satisfied first, for it is not good to take the children’s bread and throw it to the dogs.”

esv.text: And he said to her, “Let the children be fed first, for it is not right to take the children’s bread and throw it to the dogs.”

cnv.text: 耶穌對她說：“應該先讓兒女吃飽。拿兒女的餅去丟給小狗吃是不好的。”

ccb.text: 耶稣对她说：“要先让儿女们吃饱，因为把儿女的食物丢给狗吃不合适。”

csbs.text: 耶稣对她说：“应该先让儿女吃饱，因为拿儿女的饼扔给小狗，是不合宜的。”
